[OnSucceedAttack] If this unit is faster than the target, inflict [Laceration] Count equal to their Speed difference (Max 3)

descs.desc:
At 6+ Speed, Coin Power +1
[WhenUse] Gain 2 [Agility] next turn
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] If this unit is faster than the target, inflict [Laceration] Count equal to their Speed difference (Max 4)

descs.desc:
At 8+ Speed, Coin Power +1
Deal more damage based on target's missing HP (+0.3% damage per 1% missing HP)

At 6+ Speed, Coin Power +1
Deal more damage based on target's missing HP (+0.5% damage per 1% missing HP)
[OnSucceedEvade] Gain 1 [Agility] next turn (3 times per turn)

If target has 7+ [Laceration], gain +2 Coin Power
[OnSucceedEvade] Gain 1 [Agility] next turn (3 times per turn)

1060701.name: Hook
1060701.desc: Upon defeating an enemy, gain 1 [Enhancement] next turn (Once per turn)

1060721.name: Mass-produced Bionic Gear
1060721.desc: When 1 ally with the fastest Speed defeats an enemy inflicted with [Laceration], gain 1 [Enhancement] next turn (Once per turn)
